properties.description: Dataflow to convert P6 Engineering data with unpivot per date

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	p_df_sub_class as string
}
source(output(
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Original Duration} as string,
		{Actual Duration} as string,
		{Remaining Duration} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Actual Start} as string,
		{Actual Finish} as string,
		{Remaining Late Start} as string,
		{Remaining Late Finish} as string,
		Calendar as string,
		{Budgeted Units} as string,
		{Actual Units} as string,
		{Remaining Units} as string,
		WBS as string,
		{WBS Name} as string,
		{Cost Account} as string,
		Role as string,
		{Resource ID} as string,
		{Resource ID Name} as string,
		{Resource Name} as string,
		{Resource Type} as string,
		{GLOBAL - CHANGE MANAGEMENT} as string,
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - FUNCTION} as string,
		{GLOBAL - MILESTONES} as string,
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PHASE} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - REGION} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SCHEDULE RISK ASSESSMENT} as string,
		{GLOBAL - STORAGE SOLUTIONS} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)} as string,
		{GLOBAL - SUPPLY CHAIN} as string,
		{Spreadsheet Field} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true) ~> SrcP6ResourceSpread
FltIncorrectActivity derive(Project_Number = iif(length(regexSplit(WBS,'[-]')[1])>5,concat('99',regexSplit(WBS,'[-]')[1]),regexSplit(WBS,'[-]')[1]),
		PRIME = coalesce({GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)},{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)}),
		SUBPRIME = coalesce({GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)},{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)}),
		{Activity ID} = trim({Activity ID}),
		{Spreadsheet Field} = concat($p_df_sub_class,{Spreadsheet Field})) ~> dcGetProjectPrime
dcGetProjectPrime unpivot(output(
		Period as string,
		Units as string
	),
	ungroupBy(Project_Number,
		{Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Original Duration},
		{Actual Duration},
		{Remaining Duration},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Actual Start},
		{Actual Finish},
		{Remaining Late Start},
		{Remaining Late Finish},
		Calendar,
		{Budgeted Units},
		{Actual Units},
		{Remaining Units},
		WBS,
		{WBS Name},
		{Cost Account},
		Role,
		{Resource ID},
		{Resource ID Name},
		{Resource Name},
		{Resource Type},
		{GLOBAL - CHANGE MANAGEMENT},
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE},
		{GLOBAL - FUNCTION},
		{GLOBAL - MILESTONES},
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE},
		{GLOBAL - PHASE},
		{GLOBAL - REGION},
		{GLOBAL - SCHEDULE RISK ASSESSMENT},
		{GLOBAL - STORAGE SOLUTIONS},
		{GLOBAL - SUPPLY CHAIN},
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V11)},
		{GLOBAL - PRIME (GCOA V13)},
		PRIME,
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V11)},
		{GLOBAL - SUBPRIME (GCOA V13)},
		SUBPRIME,
		{Spreadsheet Field}),
	lateral: false,
	ignoreNullPivots: true) ~> UnpivotData
UnpivotData filter(Units != '-99') ~> FltDummyRows
SrcP6ResourceSpread filter(!({Activity ID}=='No Activity ID'||isNull({Activity Name}))) ~> FltIncorrectActivity
FltDummyRows sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:['p6_resource_spread.csv'],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		Project_Number,
		{Activity ID},
		{Activity Name},
		{Original Duration},
		{Actual Duration},
		{Remaining Duration},
		Start,
		Finish,
		{Actual Start},
		{Actual Finish},
		{Remaining Late Start},
		{Remaining Late Finish},
		Calendar,
		{Budgeted Units},
		{Actual Units},
		{Remaining Units},
		WBS,
		{WBS Name},
		{Cost Account},
		Role,
		{Resource ID},
		{Resource ID Name},
		{Resource Name},
		{Resource Type},
		{GLOBAL - CHANGE MANAGEMENT},
		{GLOBAL - EXECUTED BY TYPE},
		{GLOBAL - FUNCTION},
		{GLOBAL - MILESTONES},
		{GLOBAL - OFFICE},
		{GLOBAL - PHASE},
		{GLOBAL - REGION},
		{GLOBAL - SCHEDULE RISK ASSESSMENT},
		{GLOBAL - STORAGE SOLUTIONS},
		{GLOBAL - SUPPLY CHAIN},
		PRIME,
		SUBPRIME,
		{Spreadsheet Field},
		Period,
		Units
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> SnkP6ResourceSpread
